title: Deeper and Darker: Spellbooks
description: An Addon for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks and Deeper and Darker
body:
An Addon between Deeper and Darker and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks that adds Warden Battlemage Armor, new Spellbook, new Staff, and 4 new Summon Spells.

If you find any bugs while playing the mod, then please do let me know in my Discussion Post on the Official Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks Discord Server.

Thanks to my friend MilkStache for creating the models!! :D

Feel free to use this in any modpack you'd like as well.

Note: If the staff isn't Animated, You're using an old version of Azurelib in the pack, the most newest version from March 23rd fixes it
